goal: Reevaluate the step06 event-safe candidate family after removing oracle-only runtime features and guard inputs.

runtimeOnlyCorrections.futureTargetDistance: Kept as DataRow.FutureTargetDistance for training labels and evaluation metrics only.
runtimeOnlyCorrections.runtimeTargetDisplacementEstimate: Computed as max(0, horizonMs / 1000) * v2 speed from current/past samples.
runtimeOnlyCorrections.speedFeatureChange: Replaced future/reference target speed / 3000 with runtime v2 speed / 3000.

deploymentGate: Same step06 deployment gate: product-relative held-out test normal visual p95/p99, held-out test normal-moving futureLag p95/p99 with subpixel tolerance, robustness stop-event checks, overall futureLead p99, and held-out stationary jitter p95.
